subcodes.first_line: O reformer of the beloved ones! Peace and harmony are among the requisites of the love of God. Praise be to God that thou hast been confirmed in fostering unity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مصلح احباء صلح و صفاء از لوازم محبت الله است حمد خدا را که موفق بر اصلاح
subcodes.subjects: @universal peace; world unity, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
